prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright — this is the moment. You don’t need perfect or finished, you just need to begin. Pick one tiny concrete step (open the file, write one sentence, set a 20-minute timer) and do that now. Momentum builds fast — once you’ve started, it gets easier. You’ve handled hard things before; trust yourself and keep going. Take a deep breath, press start, and prove to yourself you can.
